heroSubtitle: A powerful flashcard-based learning web app that combines the flexibility of Google Sheets with effective memorization techniques.
heroSecurityNote: Your Security is a Priority: The SpreadsheetMemo app has been positively verified by the Google Data Safety Team.
featureLearningMethodDesc:
An effective two-round system reinforces what you learn in each session.
The app then prioritizes the most challenging flashcards for upcoming lessons to create a complete and personalized learning cycle.
featureCustomizationDesc: Tailor each study session to your needs. Choose which document to use, select a specific sheet or named range, and decide how many items to include per lesson. Focus on new or unstudied items, or include all items for a complete learning experience. You can even enable bidirectional mode - perfect for mastering vocabulary.
featureDocumentsDesc:
Keep your learning organized with dedicated Google Sheets for each subject, like math or vocabulary.
Enjoy the full power of Google's ecosystem - seamless syncing, automatic backups, real-time collaboration, easy sharing, and printing.
featureSheetsDesc: Organize content within a single document. Use sheets (tabs) to separate topics like 'Idioms' and 'Phrasal Verbs', or leverage Named Ranges to slice your material into smaller, focused parts. Perfect for complex subjects.
featureRichContentDesc: Add images, links, mathematical equations (TeX/AsciiMath), and YouTube videos. Enrich your content with advanced formatting like bold text, lists, and sections using Wiki Markup.
featureFormulasDesc: Harness the full power of Google Sheets formulas to create dynamic flashcards. Generate random numbers for math problems, concatenate text, or build complex questions on the fly. Your learning materials can be as dynamic as you need them to be.
featureImportDesc:
Get started quickly by importing data. You can use CSV files from your computer or a URL to instantly create new, fully-featured Google Sheets documents.
Don't forget to check out the Open Flashcard Library for ready-to-use sets.
featureMobileDesc:
Study anywhere, anytime. Works seamlessly on computers, tablets, and smartphones.
All you need is a web browser and a Google account!
featureSecurityDesc: Your documents belong only to you. No personal information is collected or shared. From the app's perspective, you are anonymous.
libraryDesc: A free collection of ready-to-use learning documents that you can import directly into SpreadsheetMemo as Google Sheets documents. It's also a place to share knowledge and support others on their learning journey.
libraryContributionDesc: This library is open for anyone to contribute and improve. Have a great set of flashcards to share, an idea to improve an existing one, or a correction to make? Every contribution is valuable and helps make learning better for everyone.
freeForeverDesc: No ads, no hidden costs. Completely free for personal and educational use.
privacyDesc: Your privacy is the top priority. SpreadsheetMemo doesn't collect any personal information, and all your data stays in your Google Drive.
footerCredit: Crafted with ❤️ as a passion project
